name: Human-in-the-Loop MCP
what_it_does: Human-in-the-Loop MCP server enabling AI agents to request human approval or input before taking actions — pausing agent workflows for human review, collecting human decisions and confirmations, and integrating human oversight checkpoints into agent-driven automation workflows requiring approval gates.
use_cases: Requiring human approval before irreversible agent operations
Collecting human input for decisions requiring judgment from orchestration agents
Implementing safety checkpoints in autonomous agent workflows
Getting human confirmation for high-risk actions from safety-critical agents
Integrating human review into AI-assisted workflows from responsible AI systems
Building approval-gated agent pipelines from workflow automation agents
not_for: Fully autonomous workflows requiring no human intervention
High-frequency operations where human approval latency is unacceptable
Use cases where human availability cannot be guaranteed
best_when: An autonomous agent needs to pause for human review at critical decision points — implementing responsible AI oversight with approval gates in agent workflows.
avoid_when: You need fully autonomous operation without human checkpoints, or human latency would break the workflow.

auth.notes: No MCP authentication — local server presenting approval prompts. Human interaction via terminal or UI. No external service dependencies.

pricing.notes: Free open source human-in-the-loop MCP server.

performance.rate_limits: Human response latency — depends on human availability

known_agent_gotchas: Agent blocks indefinitely waiting for human response — must have timeout strategy
Human availability required — workflows fail if no human is present
Community MCP — presentation UI may be minimal (terminal prompts)
Not suitable for overnight or unattended agent runs without human monitoring
Human decision quality depends on context provided to human reviewer
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local human interaction. No credentials. No external data. Community MCP. Human oversight adds security by design — ensures human review before critical operations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local human interaction. No credentials. Enhances security through human oversight. Community MCP.
